articles.title: Ollie Robinson was 'nowhere near ready for Ashes' despite stunning comeback display
articles.description: Fast bowler shows what might have been with brilliant wobble-seam bowling on opening day at Lord's

articles.title: Robinson routs New Zealand top-order as England hit back on 16-wicket day
articles.description: New Zealand bowled hosts out for 140, but were struck down ruthlessly in reply

articles.title: Pakistan hold their nerve to take series in low-scoring scrap
articles.description: Australia lost 7 for 38 but fought hard with the ball as Matt Kuhnemann claimed three wickets

articles.title: Dilara's fastest fifty guides Bangladesh to victory over Netherlands
articles.description: Dilara scored her fifty off 22 balls, the fastest by a Bangladesh batter in women's T20I

articles.title: Shreyas Iyer to replace Suryakumar Yadav as India's T20I captain
articles.description: Suryakumar had led India to the T20 World Cup title in March, but has been in poor batting form

articles.title: KS Bharat announces retirement from international cricket
articles.description: He represented India in seven Test matches, including in the 2023 WTC final

articles.title: Bhutan's Ritshi Choden becomes first woman cricketer to be timed out
articles.description: Nepal's cricket board was displeased with the decision and apologised for the incident after the game

articles.title: England release Rehan, Rew from Test squad for Lions 50-over series

articles.title: Ahead of Afghanistan Test, Kuldeep gets a 'feel of the red ball' after underwhelming IPL

articles.title: ICC delegation visits Bangladesh to 'review developments' on BCB's governance, electoral matters
articles.description: ICC's Dr Mohammed Moosajee and Tavengwa Mukuhlani will submit their findings and observations to the ICC around the BCB's governance issues

articles.title: IND vs AFG 2026: Afghanistan captain Hashmatullah Shahidi provides update on Rashid Khan's future in Test cricket
articles.description: Hashmatullah Shahidi also urged the Afghanistan Cricket Board (ACB) to organise more Test matches so that the players can hone their skills in the longest format.

articles.title: 'Virat Kohli almost doesn't want the life he lives in India' - Ex-RCBian Liam Livingstone reflects on Indian stalwart's off-field persona
articles.description: "He was amazing. I'd always played against Virat, and he's always laughing. If you want to have a go at someone, he'll have a go back at you," Liam Livingstone said.

articles.description: Ujjain Falcons (UF) face the Malwa Stallions (MS) in match No. 5 of the ongoing Madhya Pradesh T20 League 2026 at the Holkar Stadium in Indore on Friday, June 5.

articles.title: Nasser Hussain predicts semi-finalists at Women's T20 World Cup 2026
articles.description: Nasser Hussain predicted the semi-finalists, the team likely to surprise, the leading run-scorer, the highest wicket-taker and the Player of the Tournament for the impending Women's T20 World Cup.

articles.title: 'Everyone approved of Shafali as Pratika's replacement in a 30-second meeting' - Harmanpreet Kaur recalls big moment in Women's ODI World Cup 2025
articles.description: Amol Muzumdar, Harmanpreet Kaur, and Smriti Mandhana reflected on India being forced to find injured Pratika Rawal's replacement in the Women's ODI World Cup 2025 and eventually picking Shafali Verma.

articles.title: BCCI set to discuss retirement policy for Indian cricketers in Apex meeting
articles.description: The discussion has gained momentum following the recent case of Vijay Shankar.

articles.title: 'You need to have a better IPL than this' - Aakash Chopra on Rishabh Pant's leadership future after IPL 2026
articles.description: Aakash Chopra questioned why Rishabh Pant was removed from his role as India's vice-captain in Test cricket, despite performing very well with the bat in the format.

articles.title: Shaun Tait steps down as Bangladesh fast-bowling coach
articles.description: Tait, who joined the Bangladesh setup in May 2025, confirmed his departure on Thursday, June 04.

articles.title: India wicketkeeper KS Bharat announces retirement from international cricket
articles.description: He has represented India in seven Tests.
